jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Doubtnut
jsonLd.description:
Doubtnut invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Indore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Doubtnut:
Doubtnut is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Support students with special educational needs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Mentoring

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Doubtnut!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
